step.name: draft-pre-registration
step.action: Write the pre-reg (hypothesis, primary, ≤2 secondaries, MDE, sample size, dates).

step.name: compute-sample-and-close-date
step.action: Calculate sample size; set closes_at accordingly.

step.name: hold-position-no-peeking
step.action: No interim decision. Daily monitoring only for SRM + technical health.

step.name: close-with-srm-and-verdict
step.action: Run SRM check; if pass, compute primary + declared secondaries; open verdict card per experiment-verdict-template.
